def negative_public_api_missing_type_hints():
    rule_id = "public_api_missing_type_hints"
    family = "maintainability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Public Python functions that omit complete parameter or return annotations."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
